comment.text: This key displays the label "AI provider" within the Model section of the Create/Edit Agent dialog and in empty state messages related to AI agents. It indicates the source or vendor providing the AI models being used. Translators should ensure the term accurately reflects the type of AI provider being referenced.

usage.context:
<StyledParam increaseGap>
 <div className=" set_room_params-info">
 <div>
 <Text fontSize="13px" lineHeight="20px" fontWeight={600} noSelect>
 {t("Model", {
 aiProvider: t("Common:AIProvider"),
 })}
 </Text>
 <Text
 fontSize="12px"
 lineHeight="16px"

<StyledParam increaseGap>
 <div className=" set_room_params-info">
 <div>
 <Text fontSize="13px" lineHeight="20px" fontWeight={600} noSelect>
 {t("Model", {
 aiProvider: t("Common:AIProvider"),
 })}
 </Text>
 <Text
 fontSize="12px"
 lineHeight="16px"

<Button
 testId="add-provider-button"
 primary
 size={ButtonSize.small}
 label={t("AISettings:AddAIProvider", {
 aiProvider: t("Common:AIProvider"),
 })}
 scale={false}
 className={styles.addProviderButton}
 onClick={showAddProviderDialog}
 />

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'Zvogës' in Albanian means 'small' or 'diminutive'. It does not mean 'provider'. The translation currently reads 'Small of AI' instead of 'AI provider'.

The term 'Pružalac AI' is grammatically incomplete and sounds unnatural in Serbian. 'Pružalac' (provider) requires a noun to follow it or a different construction to indicate 'AI provider' (provider of AI).
